## Description 📝
Provide a summary of the change and which issue it resolves. List any dependencies added.

Fixes # (issue reference)

## Type of Change 🛠️
Check the options that apply:
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Verification & Compilation Checklist ✅
Before submitting your PR, please verify:
- [ ] My code compiles perfectly locally by running `npm run build` inside `apps/web`.
- [ ] I have executed typescript compilation checking with zero strict warning alerts.
- [ ] I have verified responsive renderings across mobile and desktop breakpoints.
- [ ] My commit messages follow semantic standard protocols (e.g. `feat(web): ...` or `fix(web): ...`).
- [ ] I have linked the PR to the assigned assigned issue ID.

## Screenshots or Screen Recordings (Mandatory for UI changes!) 📸
Please upload screenshots or a short GIF showing the changes in action.
